---
title: "Lecture 6 Quiz: HTML Hyperlinks & Tables"
jupyter: julia-1.12
---

::: {.callout-note}
Review before quiz:
[Lectures](/lectures/lecture-06.qmd) | [Week 2 Content](/content/week-02.qmd) | [Lab 2](/labs/lab-02.qmd) | [Assignment 1](/assignment/01-assignment.qmd)
:::

```{julia cache=true}
#| echo: false
using QuizQuestions
```

## Lecture 6 Self-Check

```{julia cache=true}
#| echo: false
choices = ["A. `<link>`", "B. `<a>`", "C. `<href>`", "D. `<nav>`"]
question = "Question 1: Which HTML element is used to create a hyperlink?"
answer = 2
radioq(choices, answer; label=question, keep_order=true)
```

```{julia cache=true}
#| echo: false
choices = ["A. `src`", "B. `name`", "C. `href`", "D. `action`"]
question = "Question 2: Which attribute specifies the destination URL of a link?"
answer = 3
radioq(choices, answer; label=question, keep_order=true)
```

```{julia cache=true}
#| echo: false
choices = ["A. `target=\"_new\"`", "B. `target=\"_blank\"`", "C. `open=\"tab\"`", "D. `window=\"new\"`"]
question = "Question 3: Which attribute value opens a hyperlink in a new browser tab?"
answer = 2
radioq(choices, answer; label=question, keep_order=true)
```

```{julia cache=true}
#| echo: false
choices = ["A. `<td>`", "B. `<tr>`", "C. `<th>`", "D. `<table>`"]
question = "Question 4: Which table tag represents a row in an HTML table?"
answer = 2
radioq(choices, answer; label=question, keep_order=true)
```

```{julia cache=true}
#| echo: false
choices = ["A. `<thead>`", "B. `<tbody>`", "C. `<tfoot>`", "D. `<caption>`"]
question = "Question 5: Which element is used to provide a title/description for a table?"
answer = 4
radioq(choices, answer; label=question, keep_order=true)
```
